docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, E MARIO DBA HAF INT'L CONSULTING AS TO DEFENDANT SANTILLANO, ALEJANDRO SANTILLANO, MARIA GUADALUPE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
